title: Antique Dragons
description: Add Custom Dragons Markers (Fire, Ice and Lightning) for the Antique Atlas.
body:
This Mod adds a new Dragon Marker to the Antique Atlas Mod.

![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/pK1N5vKQ/images/e12578fada1afae706debae82478b674f312c601.png)

![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/pK1N5vKQ/images/ce1ce0d38da39ddc4f00f68298ba3307def77be3.png)

The original idea is for RLCraft to add the Dragon Markers.

Depedencies:

- Ice and Fire
- Citadel
- Antique Atlas
- Cloth API (Forge)
